summary.shape_sentence: Early sell program from the open, midday rebound that failed below prior supply, then a second-leg afternoon bleed into a weak close.

goat.note: Best expansion leg was the early-session selloff from the open region into the first major morning low.

red_circles.behavior: Appeared repeatedly at bounce failures and lower highs, reinforcing bearish continuation.

green_circles.behavior: Marked reactive support bounces that stayed mostly countertrend and failed to reverse the day.

orange_banks_supply.behavior: Supply clustered around 25060-25120 and later near 24980-25000; these zones were largely respected and capped rebounds.

blue_banks_demand.behavior: Demand appeared around 24920-24940, 24860, and 24740-24780; several levels were tested, briefly defended, then broken.

time_markers.10am_blue: Already rolling over from the open, with downside control taking hold.
time_markers.12pm_red: Midday rebound was pressing into supply but had not regained full bullish control.
time_markers.2pm_green: Rebound had failed and the market was transitioning into afternoon continuation lower.
time_markers.4pm_yellow: Closed weak after a late washout, with only a small bounce off the lows.

takeaway: Bearish continuation day with early distribution, failed lunchtime reclaim, and a second-leg afternoon extension lower.
